en: Oh, damn, I've never been to a restaurant this nice.
ko: 세상에, 이렇게 좋은 식당 처음 와봐.

en: I've never even worked at a restaurant this nice.
ko: 이렇게 좋은 식당에서 일해본 적도 없어.

en: My bread, their malt, and all the cake is life-changing.
ko: 이 빵, 몰트, 케이크 전부 인생이 바뀌어.

en: Oprah says that your birthday dictates the kind of year you're about to have.
ko: 오프라가 생일이 앞으로의 한 해를 결정한대.

en: I haven't eaten a thing in the past 36 hours
ko: 비싼 음식 최대한 먹으려고 36시간 동안 굶었어.

en: in order to be able to, like, really stuff myself with as much expensive food as possible.
It's gonna raise my market value, like, so much.
ko: 내 시장 가치가 엄청 올라갈 거야.

en: I'm gonna have a high, high end year.
I've been overeating this week and then emptying myself with laxatives.
ko: 이번 주 과식하고 완하제로 비우는 중이야.

en: It's been working really well. Too well.
